title: Will Tottenham or West Ham stay up? Will Bayern wi...
summary: The Premier League faces a tense relegation battle as Tottenham and West Ham compete to avoid the drop, while a David vs. Goliath matchup unfolds in Portugal. Analyst Julien Laurens provides his predictions for these pivotal contests.
content: Relegation beckons in the Premier League for either Spurs or West Ham, while there's a David vs. Golaith battle happening in Portugal. Julien Laurens makes his predictions.

zh.title: 托特纳姆热刺或西汉姆联会保级吗？
zh.summary: 英超联赛面临紧张的降级战，托特纳姆热刺和西汉姆联争夺避免降级，同时葡萄牙上演一场大卫对歌利亚的对阵。分析师朱利安·劳伦斯为这些关键比赛提供了他的预测。

title: Alonso's first big Chelsea test? Facing a team tha...
summary: Chelsea will face AC Milan, Juventus, and Tottenham during their summer preseason tour, but one opponent possesses a more formidable record than any of them. The fixture represents a significant early test for manager Alonso.
content: Chelsea will play AC Milan, Juventus and Tottenham this summer. But one opponent on their preseason tour has a more fearsome record than any of them.

zh.title: 阿隆索的切尔西首次大考？
zh.summary: 切尔西将在夏季季前赛巡演中面对AC米兰、尤文图斯和托特纳姆热刺，但其中一个对手的战绩比他们中的任何一个都更强大。这场比赛对主帅阿隆索来说是一个重要的早期考验。

title: Transfer rumors, news: Barcelona look to land Tott...
summary: Bayern Munich is pursuing Manchester City defender John Stones in the transfer market as summer activity accelerates. Transfer Talk reports on the latest developments in this high-profile move.
content: Bayern Munich are reportedly at a move for Manchester City defender John Stones. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传闻、新闻：巴塞罗那寻求签下托特...
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑在转会市场上追逐曼城后卫约翰·斯通斯，夏季活动不断加速。转会新闻报道了这一备受瞩目的转会的最新动向。

title: McTominay likely to sign new Napoli deal - gossip
summary: Scotland international Scott McTominay is set to extend his contract with Napoli and continue his Serie A stint. Meanwhile, Burnley intensifies its managerial search by targeting a Celtic-linked candidate.
content: Scotland star poised to extend Serie A stay, while Burnley step up their pursuit of Celtic-linked manager

zh.title: 麦克托米奈可能与那不勒斯签署新合约 - 传言
zh.summary: 苏格兰国脚斯科特·麦克托米奈即将与那不勒斯延长合约，继续其意甲生涯。与此同时，伯恩利加强了管理层搜寻，目标锁定一名与凯尔特人有关联的候选人。

title: From Benidorm beaches to Barcelona - the rise of Lopez
summary: Ahead of Saturday's Women's Champions League final, BBC Sport profiles Vicky Lopez's remarkable rise to football's global stage. Her journey reflects the growing prominence of women's football.
content: With the Women's Champions League final between Barcelona and Lyon on Saturday, BBC Sport takes a look at the extraordinary rise of football's next global superstar, Vicky Lopez.

zh.title: 从贝尼多姆海滩到巴塞罗那 - 洛佩斯的崛起
zh.summary: 在周六女性欧冠决赛前，BBC体育报道了维姬·洛佩斯令人瞩目的足球生涯崛起。她的旅程反映了女性足球日益增长的重要性。

title: Ronaldo wins first Saudi title as Al Nassr clinch
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo scored twice as Al Nassr defeated Damac 4-1 to secure the Saudi Pro League title in Thursday's match. The victory marks Ronaldo's first championship since joining the Saudi league in January 2023.
content: Cristiano Ronaldo scored twice as his Al Nassr team beat Damac 4-1 Thursday to earn the Portugal star his first Saudi Pro League title since moving to the league in January 2023.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多赢得首个沙特冠军 纳赛尔夺冠
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多打进两球，帮助纳赛尔在周四的比赛中以4-1击败达马克，锁定沙特职业联赛冠军。这场胜利标志着罗纳尔多自2023年1月加入沙特联赛以来的首个冠军。

title: Maguire 'shocked and gutted' to miss out on WC
summary: Harry Maguire has been excluded from England's 2026 World Cup squad, with Chelsea defenders Levi Colwill and Cole Palmer also missing out on the 26-man selection. Maguire expressed disappointment about his omission.
content: Chelsea duo Levi Colwill and Cole Palmer are set to miss out on England's 2026 World Cup squad, sources confirmed to ESPN, with Harry Maguire confirming he is not part of the 26-man party.

zh.title: 马奎尔因缺席世界杯"震惊和失望"
zh.summary: 哈里·马奎尔被排除在英格兰2026年世界杯阵容之外，切尔西后卫莱维·科尔威尔和科尔·帕默尔也未能入选26人名单。马奎尔对自己的缺席表示失望。

title: Mamdani's $50 WCup ticket lottery fuels NJ feud
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani announced a lottery offering 1,000 World Cup tickets to city residents for $50 each. The initiative has sparked local controversy amid efforts to make the tournament accessible.
content: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said Thursday that 1,000 tickets costing just $50 will be made available to residents of the city of more than 8 million for the World Cup.

zh.title: 曼达尼的50美元世界杯门票抽签激怒新泽西州
zh.summary: 纽约市市长佐赫兰·曼达尼宣布了一项彩票活动，向城市居民提供1,000张世界杯门票，每张50美元。这项举措在努力提高锦标赛可及性的过程中引发了当地争议。

title: EFL: 'Deplorable' Saints pressured staff to spy
summary: The English Football League condemned Southampton for orchestrating a systematic scheme to spy on opponents using coercive tactics against junior staff. The findings represent a serious breach of league conduct standards.
content: Southampton conducted a "contrived and determined plan" to spy on opponents via "deplorable" treatment of junior members of staff who were pressured to comply, according to the English Football League.

zh.title: 英足总："令人厌恶"的圣人队施压员工进行间谍活动
zh.summary: 英格兰足球联赛谴责南安普敦精心策划了一项系统性的间谍计划，对对手进行监视，并对初级员工使用胁迫策略。这些调查结果代表了对联赛行为标准的严重违反。

title: Masked Modric back to aid Pulisic, Milan UCL push
summary: AC Milan looks to a masked Luka Modric to help secure Champions League qualification as Serie A's season reaches its climax. The dramatic final day could determine European spots for multiple Italian clubs.
content: AC Milan will be looking to a masked superhero as the battle for the Champions League spots goes down to the last day in Serie A.

zh.title: 莫德里奇受伤复出助米兰冲击欧冠
zh.summary: 米兰期待受伤复出的莫德里奇帮助球队保住欧冠参赛资格，意甲本赛季进入最后冲刺阶段。戏剧性的最后一轮比赛将决定多支意甲球队的欧洲席位。

title: USMNT's Richards tears ankle ligaments before WC
summary: USMNT defender Chris Richards sustained two torn ankle ligaments but is expected to recover in time for the World Cup starting in three weeks. His availability remains crucial to the U.S. team's defensive planning.
content: USMNT defender Chris Richards has suffered two torn ligaments in his ankle, however a source told ESPN that he is expected to be fit for the World Cup that kicks off in three weeks.

zh.title: 美国队后卫理查兹世界杯前脚踝韧带撕裂
zh.summary: 美国队后卫克里斯·理查兹脚踝韧带遭两处撕裂，但预计能在三周后开始的世界杯前康复。他的出场状态对美国队的防线配置至关重要。

title: PSG's Dembele vows to be '100% fit' for UCL final
summary: Paris Saint-Germain forward Ousmane Dembélé has committed to being fully fit for the Champions League final against Arsenal. His condition will be pivotal to PSG's chances in the European showcase.
content: Paris Saint-Germain forward Ousmane Dembélé has promised to be fit for the Champions League final with Arsenal.

zh.title: 登贝莱誓言欧冠决赛保持"百分百"状态
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼前锋乌斯曼·登贝莱承诺在对阵阿森纳的欧冠决赛中保持最佳状态。他的身体状况将对PSG在欧洲顶级赛事中的前景起到关键作用。

title: GK Neuer, 40, makes Germany World Cup squad
summary: Germany coach Julian Nagelsmann has convinced 40-year-old goalkeeper Manuel Neuer to return from retirement for the 2026 World Cup. The veteran's recall underscores Germany's confidence in his experience for the tournament.
content: Veteran goalkeeper Manuel Neuer has been coaxed out of retirement for the World Cup by Germany coach Julian Nagelsmann.

zh.title: 40岁门神诺伊尔入选德国世界杯阵容
zh.summary: 德国主教练纳格尔斯曼说服了已退役的40岁门神曼努埃尔·诺伊尔复出，参加2026年世界杯。这位资深门神的回归凸显了德国队对其经验价值的信心。

title: 👀 World Cup kit ranking: Every jersey we will see...
summary: The 2026 World Cup will be the first tournament with 48 teams, generating over 100 unique kits across participating nations. ESPN ranks the jerseys released so far in this historic expanded competition.
content: The 2026 World Cup will be the first with 48 teams, bringing a total of more than 100 kits! Here are all the ones released so far, from worst to first.

zh.title: 👀 世界杯球衣排名：我们将看到的每件球衣...
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯将是首次有48支球队参加的赛事，参赛国家将推出超过100款独特球衣。ESPN对这届历史性扩大规模的世界杯迄今发布的球衣进行了排名。
